title: BASIC NEEDS - 211info
text: DORCAS ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a food pantry, lunch, clothing bank, furniture, and household items. 1360 NE 9th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: -Unrestricted for most services -Food pantry: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Tuesday 9am-11am and noon-1:30pm, lunch 11am-noon Email (541) 476-2052 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 476-2052 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address AREA SERVED: Douglas and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday 9am-1:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Josephine Community Transit (JCT) bus route 10 Services: Community Meals Food Pantries Furniture General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
